title: Junior Revenue Manager at Goa Tourism Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Goa Tourism Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Goa Tourism Holdings Services in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Goa Tourism Holdings Services:
Goa Tourism Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goa Tourism Holdings Services!
